lines.speaker: Thief
lines.text: Another lovely day in this dung heap.

lines.speaker: Thief
lines.text: Watch yourself, I don't trust you.

lines.speaker: Thief
lines.text: The thieves down here are just small time. The real thieves are the ones who rule.

lines.speaker: Thief
lines.text: Ain't no honour down here. Never assume otherwise.

lines.speaker: Thief
lines.text: I made a good score the other day.
